label: MigDC
evidence: Reynolds 2021 main text: 'The clusters at the convergence of these branches (moDC3, LC4 and migratory DC (Mig. DC)) express transcripts associated with DC maturation (CD83, CCR7, LAMP3, CD40, CD86), immunoregulation (CD274, IDO1, CD200, PDCD1LG2, SOCS1) and migration (FSCN1, PLGRKT, TRAF1, BCL2A1, CFLAR and REL).' MigDC in Gopee 2024 corresponds to Mig. DC in Reynolds 2021.
